name: Kahlua Creamy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square baking pan with foil.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar, marshmallow creme, evaporated milk, butter, Kahlua, and salt.
3. Bring the mixture to a rapid boil, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; add all chocolate pieces, stirring until melted.
5. Add chopped nuts and vanilla extract.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and refrigerate until firm.
7. To serve, cut into squares.
8. Makes about 2 3/4 pounds.
